items.title: Mike Gansey was asked if, hypothetically, the prospect of trading a young, promising player like VJ Edgecombe for an established superstar (in light of Giannis trade/Jaylen Brown trade smoke) would ever be off the table:
items.author: Austin Krell
items.body_excerpt:
Mike Gansey was asked if, hypothetically, the prospect of trading a young, promising player like VJ Edgecombe for an established superstar (in light of Giannis trade/Jaylen Brown trade smoke) would ever be off the table:

"My early conversations with VJ, seeing him, he's a stud... 1/

items.title: Nick Nurse is not sure about three-guard lineups with Labaron Philon Jr., Tyrese Maxey and VJ Edgecombe, but thinks Philon can play right away and can play both guard positions.
items.author: Adam Aaronson
items.body_excerpt: Nick Nurse is not sure about three-guard lineups with Labaron Philon Jr., Tyrese Maxey and VJ Edgecombe, but thinks Philon can play right away and can play both guard positions.

items.title: Nick Nurse calls Labaron Philon Jr. an "exciting" player who can play like Tyrese Maxey and VJ Edgecombe. Mentioned Philon's deep range and pick-and-roll chops.
items.author: Adam Aaronson
items.body_excerpt: Nick Nurse calls Labaron Philon Jr. an "exciting" player who can play like Tyrese Maxey and VJ Edgecombe. Mentioned Philon's deep range and pick-and-roll chops.

items.title: Mike Gansey on VJ Edgecombe: "He's a stud, on and off the court... I'm just excited we have VJ... He doesn't know how good he can be."
items.author: Adam Aaronson
items.body_excerpt: Mike Gansey on VJ Edgecombe: "He's a stud, on and off the court... I'm just excited we have VJ... He doesn't know how good he can be."

items.title: Mike Gansey says Labaron Philon Jr. can learn from VJ Edgecombe on defense.
items.author: Adam Aaronson
items.body_excerpt:
Mike Gansey says Labaron Philon Jr. can learn from VJ Edgecombe on defense.

Said as a freshman, Philon picked up full-court, showed good instincts, toughness, hands, physicality, competitiveness. "He'll try to hold his own. The hope is he can be average to above-average."

items.title: Mike Gansey says Nick Nurse thinks "at times" Labaron Philon Jr. could play with Tyrese Maxey and VJ Edgecombe.
items.author: Adam Aaronson
items.body_excerpt:
Mike Gansey says Nick Nurse thinks "at times" Labaron Philon Jr. could play with Tyrese Maxey and VJ Edgecombe.

"I don't see a lot of minutes, but maybe in certain situations I can."

items.title: Mike Gansey says the Labaron Philon Jr. pick "helps" Nick Nurse, citing the massive workloads shouldered by Tyrese Maxey and VJ Edgecombe last year. Says Philon needs to put on weight but "really guarded."
items.author: Adam Aaronson
items.body_excerpt:
Mike Gansey says the Labaron Philon Jr. pick "helps" Nick Nurse, citing the massive workloads shouldered by Tyrese Maxey and VJ Edgecombe last year. Says Philon needs to put on weight but "really guarded."

"I know it's in him... he's competitive."

"We can't have enough guards."

items.title: Mike Gansey said the Sixers need help at every position, so he believes Labaron Philon is a fit at guard. References the workload of Tyrese Maxey and VJ Edgecombe last season.
items.author: Paul Hudrick
items.body_excerpt: Mike Gansey said the Sixers need help at every position, so he believes Labaron Philon is a fit at guard. References the workload of Tyrese Maxey and VJ Edgecombe last season.

items.title: Mike Gansey says Labaron Philon Jr. will learn from Tyrese Maxey and VJ Edgecombe.
items.author: Adam Aaronson
items.body_excerpt:
Mike Gansey says Labaron Philon Jr. will learn from Tyrese Maxey and VJ Edgecombe.

"He's a hooper. He just finds a way."

Talked about a game against Tennessee in which Philon took over down the stretch. Mentioned he played through injuries this season.

items.title: Labaron Philon with a lot of praise for Tyrese Maxey and VJ Edgecombe. Said he studied Maxey's game and played against Edgecombe in high school. Believes the three of them can form a great gift.
items.author: Paul Hudrick
items.body_excerpt: Labaron Philon with a lot of praise for Tyrese Maxey and VJ Edgecombe. Said he studied Maxey's game and played against Edgecombe in high school. Believes the three of them can form a great gift.

items.title: Says he knows and has played against VJ Edgecombe in …
items.author: HoopsHype
items.body_excerpt: Says he knows and has played against VJ Edgecombe in … HoopsHype

items.title: Labaron Philon Jr. says he studied Tyrese Maxey because of Maxey's ability to create his own shot, selflessness and fearlessness taking tough shots. "At the guard spot, that's really what you need: someone that's going to be a great leader." Mentioned Maxey welcoming VJ Edgecombe
items.author: Adam Aaronson
items.body_excerpt: Labaron Philon Jr. says he studied Tyrese Maxey because of Maxey's ability to create his own shot, selflessness and fearlessness taking tough shots. "At the guard spot, that's really what you need: someone that's going to be a great leader." Mentioned Maxey welcoming VJ Edgecombe.

items.title: Labaron Philon said he's learned how to play on and off ball during his two seasons at Alabama. Said his job will be to take pressure off Tyrese Maxey and VJ Edgecombe. Said it's "special" to play with a talented roster.
items.author: Paul Hudrick
items.body_excerpt: Labaron Philon said he's learned how to play on and off ball during his two seasons at Alabama. Said his job will be to take pressure off Tyrese Maxey and VJ Edgecombe. Said it's "special" to play with a talented roster.

items.title: Labaron Philon Jr. on his fit with Tyrese Maxey + VJ Edgecombe: "Just making the game easier on them, being able to take the pressure off [them]... I would just say with Joel and all the other guys... it's special."
items.author: Adam Aaronson
items.body_excerpt:
Labaron Philon Jr. on his fit with Tyrese Maxey + VJ Edgecombe: "Just making the game easier on them, being able to take the pressure off [them]... I would just say with Joel and all the other guys... it's special."

Philon says he doesn't prefer playing on or off the ball.

items.title: Labaron Philon says that he connected with Jameer Nelson at the combine, and knew the Sixers were itnerested. Calls it destiny to play with Tyrese Maxey and VJ Edgecombe, saying that he can fit in well with the pace that they play, and that he can play both on, and off, ball.
items.author: Derek Bodner
items.body_excerpt: Labaron Philon says that he connected with Jameer Nelson at the combine, and knew the Sixers were itnerested. Calls it destiny to play with Tyrese Maxey and VJ Edgecombe, saying that he can fit in well with the pace that they play, and that he can play both on, and off, ball.

items.title: Asked Labaron Philon Jr. if he had pre-draft contact with the Sixers + what stands out to him about his fit. Said he talked to Jameer Nelson + others at the combine this year & talked to them last year. Said he wants to play fast-paced basketball with Tyrese Maxey + VJ Edgecombe.
items.author: Adam Aaronson
items.body_excerpt: Asked Labaron Philon Jr. if he had pre-draft contact with the Sixers + what stands out to him about his fit. Said he talked to Jameer Nelson + others at the combine this year & talked to them last year. Said he wants to play fast-paced basketball with Tyrese Maxey + VJ Edgecombe.

items.title: New: In May of 2025, I talked to @baumboards.bsky.social about the idea of the Sixers drafting a guard from Baylor named VJ Edgecombe.
items.author: Adam Aaronson
items.body_excerpt:
New: In May of 2025, I talked to @baumboards.bsky.social about the idea of the Sixers drafting a guard from Baylor named VJ Edgecombe.

So, we had to run it back. Now, Maxwell is making the case for a much different prospect: Iowa State forward Joshua Jefferson:

media.title: Asking an NBA Draft expert about Joshua Jefferson's fit with the Sixers
media.description: "Joshua Jefferson is a hyperintelligent, hyperphysical force who manages to stuff the stat sheet by both outthinking and outworking opponents."
